'''ngaladha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumohemoperitoneum|pneumohemoperitoneum]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumohemoperitoneum|pneumohemoperitoneum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngaladha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngælædhæth|ngælædhæth]] || [[word:ngælædhæj|ngælædhæj]] || [[word:ngælædhæsh|ngælædhæsh]] || [[word:ngælædhæ|ngælædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngalaladhath|ngalaladhath]] || [[word:ngalaladhaj|ngalaladhaj]] || [[word:ngalaladhash|ngalaladhash]] || [[word:ngalaladha|ngalaladha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngaladhath|ngaladhath]] || [[word:ngaladhaj|ngaladhaj]] || [[word:ngaladhash|ngaladhash]] || [[word:ngaladha|ngaladha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngalafdhath|ngalafdhath]] || [[word:ngalafdhaj|ngalafdhaj]] || [[word:ngalafdhash|ngalafdhash]] || [[word:ngalafdhaf|ngalafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngaladhatha|ngaladhatha]] || [[word:ngaladhaja|ngaladhaja]] || [[word:ngaladhasha|ngaladhasha]] || [[word:ngaladhaka|ngaladhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngaladhath|ngaladhath]] || [[word:ngaladhaj|ngaladhaj]] || [[word:ngaladhash|ngaladhash]] || [[word:ngaladha|ngaladha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngaladhathal|ngaladhathal]] || [[word:ngaladhajal|ngaladhajal]] || [[word:ngaladhashal|ngaladhashal]] || [[word:ngaladhakal|ngaladhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngaladhathatha|ngaladhathatha]] || [[word:ngaladhajaja|ngaladhajaja]] || [[word:ngaladhashasha|ngaladhashasha]] || [[word:ngaladhaka|ngaladhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngaladhathan|ngaladhathan]] || [[word:ngaladhajan|ngaladhajan]] || [[word:ngaladhashan|ngaladhashan]] || [[word:ngaladhakan|ngaladhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngaladhathaoro|ngaladhathaoro]] || [[word:ngaladhajaoro|ngaladhajaoro]] || [[word:ngaladhashaoro|ngaladhashaoro]] || [[word:ngaladhakaoro|ngaladhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
